description: Elation Health provides electronic health record and related practice-management capabilities for healthcare organizations. Its platform includes patient chart, scheduling, billing, messaging, and interoperability features including FHIR and HL7.
summary: Elation Health exposes a REST API, a SMART-on-FHIR FHIR API, and a hosted remote MCP server; both HTTP APIs require OAuth-derived bearer tokens, while MCP auth is documented only generically.
